---
title: Registration
---

Registration is via [ **this link**  {{< fa solid link >}}](https://uobevents.eventsair.com/gisruk-2026/gisruk-registration/).  


|                              | Student  | Non-student |
|------------------------------|----------|-------------|
| Early bird (ends 11 March) | £190     | £250        |
| Standard       | £220     | £280        |


<br>
